# Omni Service Node v3.1

> The petrol station for autonomous AI agents. 56 pay-per-call endpoints. Pure USDC on Base Mainnet — no accounts, no subscriptions, no rate limits.

## Payment

x402 micropayments. Wallet: `0x2DFe3B1C304DAd9F1b41D780ea81fCd137d810D8`
USDC on Base (chain 8453). Libraries: `@x402/fetch`, `@coinbase/x402`

---

## Tier 1 — $0.005 USDC/call (36 endpoints)

GET /api/v1/compliance — EU AI Act risk classification (prohibited/high-risk/limited/minimal)
POST /api/v1/sanctions — OFAC/EU/UN/UK sanctions screening
GET /api/v1/sentiment — Fear/Greed index, CoinGecko, RISK_ON/RISK_OFF signal
GET /api/v1/signals — BUY/SELL/HOLD with entry/stop/target for Gold, BTC, FX
GET /api/v1/macro — Fed rate, CPI, M2, GDP, yield curve, G10 FX
GET /api/v1/news — HackerNews + Reddit + NewsAPI scored articles
GET /api/v1/arxiv — Latest AI/ML/LLM papers with impact scoring
GET /api/v1/onchain — BTC/ETH/DeFi on-chain data, TVL, top yields
GET /api/v1/earnings — Upcoming + recent earnings, EPS, beat/miss
GET /api/v1/commodities — Gold, silver, oil, wheat, corn, copper
GET /api/v1/economic-calendar — CPI, NFP, FOMC, GDP releases
GET /api/v1/insider-trades — SEC Form 4 insider buys/sells
GET /api/v1/options-flow — Unusual options activity on SPY/QQQ/NVDA
GET /api/v1/market-movers — Top gainers, losers, most active
GET /api/v1/ipo-calendar — Upcoming + recent IPOs
GET /api/v1/analyst-ratings — Upgrades/downgrades on AI/tech stocks
GET /api/v1/fear-index — VIX + Fear & Greed index
GET /api/v1/fx-rates — Live FX rates: major, minor, crypto
GET /api/v1/nft-market — Floor prices, volume, NFT sentiment
GET /api/v1/defi-yields — Aave, Compound, Curve, Yearn + 100 protocols
GET /api/v1/token-unlocks — Upcoming vesting unlocks, supply pressure
GET /api/v1/crypto-derivatives — Funding rates, open interest, liquidations
GET /api/v1/stablecoins — Peg deviation, depeg risk for USDT/USDC/DAI/FRAX
GET /api/v1/virtuals-protocol — Virtuals Protocol AI agents by price/volume
GET /api/v1/ai-tokens — NEAR, FET, AGIX, RNDR, WLD, TAO sector data
GET /api/v1/bittensor — TAO subnets, validator rewards, network health
GET /api/v1/model-prices — Cost per 1M tokens: OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Groq
GET /api/v1/space-weather — NOAA KP index, solar flux, geomagnetic alerts
GET /api/v1/earthquake-monitor — USGS earthquakes by magnitude/region
GET /api/v1/energy-prices — Oil, gas, electricity, renewables
GET /api/v1/shipping-rates — Baltic Dry Index, container rates
GET /api/v1/semiconductor-supply — Chip supply/demand, TSMC/NVIDIA signals
GET /api/v1/merger-activity — M&A deals, premiums, strategic signals
GET /api/v1/private-equity — PE fund activity, deal flow, sector focus
GET /api/v1/real-estate-market — Housing prices, mortgage rates, inventory
GET /api/v1/github-trending — Trending repos by language, AI/ML detection

---

## Tier 2 — $5–$25 USDC/call (12 endpoints)

POST /api/v2/intel — B2B Golden Lead packets (HOT/WARM/COLD scored) — $5
GET /api/v2/github-velocity — Fortune 500 GitHub AI pivot tracker — $5
POST /api/v2/job-pivots — Companies hiring AI/agentic roles — $5
GET /api/v2/sec-filings — Real-time 8-K/10-K AI mentions — $5
GET /api/v2/patents — USPTO AI patent filings tracker — $5
POST /api/v2/company-profile — Full company dossier (SEC+GitHub+Jobs+Patents) — $5
GET /api/v2/whale-tracker — Crypto whale movements, smart money — $5
GET /api/v2/funding-rounds — VC funding rounds, valuations — $5
POST /api/v2/competitor-intel — Deep competitive analysis — $5
GET /api/v2/hedge-funds — 13F filings, sector rotations — $5
GET /api/v2/dao-governance — DAO proposals, voting, treasury — $5
GET /api/v2/geopolitical-crisis — Iran/Israel/Russia/Trump tariffs real-time — $25

---

## Bundles — $0.50–$500 USDC (8 packages)

POST /api/bundle/starter — Compliance+sentiment+signals+macro+news — $0.50
POST /api/bundle/market-intel — Signals+onchain+macro+options+insider+earnings — $25
POST /api/bundle/company-deep — Profile+intel+competitor+hedgefunds+ratings — $50
POST /api/bundle/crypto-alpha — Onchain+whale+defi+ai-tokens+derivatives — $25
POST /api/bundle/macro-global — Macro+bonds+FX+rates+inflation+labor — $50
POST /api/bundle/ai-economy — ArXiv+GitHub+jobs+model-prices+ai-tokens — $100
POST /api/bundle/sovereign — ALL endpoints. Maximum intelligence. — $500
POST /api/bundle/geopolitical — Full geopolitical war room package — $200

---

## MCP (Model Context Protocol)

Endpoint: /mcp (HTTP transport, 56 tools)
Smithery: https://smithery.ai/servers/luckkyyy23/omni-service-node

---

## Free

GET /health | GET /stats | GET /.well-known/agent-card.json | GET /.well-known/x402 | GET /llms.txt
